entry.title: Relative History 2.4.14 released
entry.content:
We’re pleased to announce the release of version 2.4.14 for Windows 8.1, Windows Phone 8.1, Windows 10 and Windows 10 Mobile.

From this release onwards, more details around changes in each version will be documented on this web site. That said, this is another incremental release, tackling memory usage and bug fixes.

As ever, please check the Help page for details on how to contact us if you need assistance or if you have any suggestions for future features.

entry.title: New web site
entry.content:
Welcome to the new web site for Relative History!

The aim of the web site is to help you get the most out of using the app, along with support resources such as answers to common questions.

If you have any feedback regarding the app or the web site, please feel free to contact Papillon Productions Supprt.

Thank you for using Relative History!
